channel.title: Mercury Recovery Field Notes
channel.description: Independent field notes and syndicated summaries on mercury remediation, water security, ASGM cleanup, and tailings recovery.

item.title: Mercury Remediation in Artisanal Gold Mining: What Actually Has to Change
item.description: A practical overview of mercury remediation priorities in artisanal and small-scale gold mining communities.

item.title: Minamata Convention ASGM Compliance: What Remediation Partners Need to Understand
item.description: How the Minamata Convention frames mercury reduction in artisanal and small-scale gold mining.

item.title: Primary Water Detection and Aquifer Protection in Mining-Affected Regions
item.description: How subsurface intelligence and water protection fit into mercury remediation work.

item.title: Tailings Recovery and Land Regeneration After Mercury-Intensive Mining
item.description: Why contaminated tailings are both an environmental liability and a land regeneration opportunity.
